title: Fresh Compats
description: Fresh Animations addon. Adds compatibility for some mobs from other mods like Supplementaries and Quark
body:
# FRESH COMPATS

## REQUIREMENTS  
This resource pack requires the **Entity Model Features** and **Entity Texture Features** mods (EMF), updated to their latest versions.  

![Requirements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf12ece20a6b53318b2569b1c6a7d8a31713cff3.png)

**Optifine is not supported**, as it does not allow model changes for modded entities.

Be sure to use them in the correct order in the resourcepack menu. Fresh Compats need Fresh Animations to work.

![Pack Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/007135a754da95d352066ee22afbf86ee5b6b244.png)

## SUPPORTED MODS AND MOBS  
- **Supplementaries:** Red Merchant, Enderman head fix  
- **You've Goat to be Kidding Me!:** Geep  
- **Sleep Tight:** Bedbug  
- **Quark:** Vanilla animal variants (cows, pigs, chicken, shinnies and bees)

![Red Merchant and frieds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a46acffbb1fdd8c58b070ee25eb46c8ba271c1c7_0.webp)

This pack also makes some minor visual adjustments to certain mobs in *Supplementaries*. For example, it updates the style of the Red Merchant and its their variants to better match the look of other villagers.

## CREDITS  
- **Fresh__LX:** Creator of the *Fresh Animation* resource pack. Many models—such as those for the villager, sheep, and spider—were used as a base for the modded entities.  
- **traben_0:** Creator of the **Entity Model Features** mod.  
- **MehVahdJukaar:** The fix for the missing eyes on the Enderman head was made possible thanks to a change implemented in *Supplementaries*.
